title: Kaido Falls From the Sky — Part 4
description: Kaido’s terrifying introduction widens the world beyond Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 16–23, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca, King Riku, Underworld Brokers deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
